title: CT17.N04 completed discharge record — Lemma — one structural event yields the translate x+
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT17.N04, the assertion node “Lemma — one structural event yields the translate x+” of tactic CT17 (Target thickening). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT17.N04. It must be exactly `CT17`, selecting Target thickening (target thickening) as the tactic that owns the assertion step “Lemma — one structural event yields the translate x+” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Lemma — one structural event yields the translate x+”. It must be exactly `CT17.N04` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT17.N04 within tactic CT17 (Target thickening). It must be exactly 4, matching the N04 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT17.N04. It must be exactly `proved`, meaning that the node's mathematical assertion or construction has been established for the assertion obligation “Lemma — one structural event yields the translate x+”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT17.N04. The array must contain `S-Prove`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Lemma — one structural event yields the translate x+”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Prove` to occur in CT17.N04's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that records the proposition, its assumptions, and proof evidence for the obligation “Lemma — one structural event yields the translate x+”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT17.N04 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Prove (proposition, assumptions, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Prove` evidence instance at CT17.N04. It must be exactly `S-Prove`, identifying the contract that records the proposition, its assumptions, and proof evidence; the same instance must supply proposition, assumptions, evidence.

statement.informal: Prove or verify: Lemma — one structural event yields the translate x+

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
